name_en: 【LV Premium Full Steel - Changeable Chip Version - Full Packaging Set】
name_cn:
【LV Premium Full Steel - Changeable Chip Version - Full Packaging Set】
【Item No.】M13014 CarryAll BB
【Description】This CarryAll BB handbag features Monogram canvas, accented with a dazzling chain and Monogram flowers, lighting up day and night occasions in a trendy style. The leather nameplate complements the tie closure, and the zippered interior pocket makes it easy to access credit cards daily.
-Monogram coated canvas, calfskin trim, fabric lining, metal hardware, tie and magnetic snap closure, zippered interior pocket, nameplate
【Size】17 x 10 x 26 cm (Height x Width x Length)
